response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, clearly exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly aligns with the role. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), solid testing/TDD culture, and architecture experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Main gaps are explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, plus no clear mention of React depth in recent roles, but overall fit is strong.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work
Strong testing/TDD background, including teaching Selenium courses and running refactoring dojos
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, DLang, C/C++) with architecture and DevOps experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not mentioned (uses Jest-era tooling and custom D test runners)
React depth unclear — listed at Optilyz but not emphasized as a core strength

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq
Depth of full-stack and testing experience
